# Feedback Form Template

A simple, focused tool for collecting user feedback, feature requests, bug reports, and suggestions. View and manage all submissions in one place.

## What's included

- **Feedback submission** — A clean form for submitting feedback
- **Feedback types** — Categorize as Bug Report, Feature Request, General Feedback, or Improvement
- **Submissions dashboard** — View all feedback in a filterable list
- **Status tracking** — Track whether feedback is New, Under Review, In Progress, or Resolved
- **Priority levels** — Mark feedback as Low, Medium, or High priority

## Data model

**Feedback**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Title | Text | Short summary of the feedback |
| Description | Text | Detailed feedback |
| Type | Selection | Bug Report, Feature Request, Feedback, Improvement |
| Priority | Selection | Low, Medium, High |
| Status | Selection | New, Under Review, In Progress, Resolved |
| Submitted by | Text | Who submitted it |
| Submitted at | Date | When it was submitted |

## Getting started

1. Go to **Templates** and select **Feedback Form**.
2. Click **Use Template** to create your project.
3. Submit some sample feedback and see it appear in the dashboard.
4. Customize it for your feedback collection needs.

## Customization ideas

> "Add a voting system so other users can upvote feedback they agree with."

> "Add an admin view where I can respond to each piece of feedback."

> "Add tags for better organization — like 'UI', 'Performance', 'Mobile'."

> "Add email notifications when new feedback is submitted."

> "Add a public feedback board where users can see what's planned and what's been resolved."

## Who this is for

- Product teams collecting user feedback
- SaaS companies managing feature requests
- Customer support teams tracking bug reports
- Anyone building a product who wants to hear from their users
